specFidelityNotes: Diff vs origin/main (19fb6189) for #404 P2-6 six-KPI Analytics: six Main KPI catalog with Net Revenue/30d defaults; hero plus five-card literal swap with router.push history; unavailable SPS/ROAS/CSAT with neutral pattern and UnavailableKpiPopover (no fixture values); mock snapshots for three available KPIs with range-scoped values, provenance, decision deep links; hero-only comparison toggle via analyticsComparisonEnabled; invalid deep link recovery; loading/partial/error screen states; Manual Refresh resets analytics state via DEFAULT_MUTABLE_MOCK_STATE; accessible sr-only chart labels and responsive/reduced-motion CSS. Aligns with docs/product/design/Screens/analytics.md and dashboard flow. No contradicting intent creep.
